name: John Lawler
background: John Lawler is Ford Vice Chair and Chief Financial Officer. He has held numerous financial leadership positions at Ford, including President of Ford China and Controller.

company_affiliations.name: Ford Motor Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various roles including Vice President, Strategy; CEO of Ford Autonomous Vehicles; Vice President of Mobility Partnerships; Controller of Ford of Europe’s Product Development; Finance leadership with Mazda Motor Corporation
